game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Navigate the rails in this high-speed endless runner! Control a character sprinting across three parallel train tracks, dodging oncoming trains, leaping over obstacles, and sliding under barriers. Collect shimmering coins to boost your score as the pace intensifies. The longer you survive, the faster you run and the more challenging the obstacles become. One collision ends your run—stay alert and keep moving!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Switch to left lane
Arrow Right / D: Switch to right lane
Arrow Up / W: Jump over obstacles
Arrow Down / S: Slide under barriers
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Resume
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and lane switching test. Validates that the player can move between all three lanes smoothly and that lane changes are responsive. Tests the fundamental control mechanics required for gameplay.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Repeatedly switch between lanes (left, center, right) in a pattern for 10 seconds. Test rapid lane changes and verify no clipping or position errors occur. Ensure player stays within track boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully switches lanes without visual glitches or position errors. All three lanes are accessible. Lane transitions are smooth and responsive. Test passes after 10 seconds of successful lane changes.

TEST_2.test_description: Jump and slide mechanics validation. Tests vertical movement controls for dodging obstacles. Ensures jump height is sufficient to clear obstacles and slide duration allows passing under barriers.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Jumps reach sufficient height with smooth arc animation. Slides lower the character appropriately. Both actions return to normal state after completion. Test succeeds after 15 seconds of successful jump/slide cycles.
TEST_2.description: Jump and slide mechanics validation. Tests vertical movement controls for dodging obstacles. Ensures jump height is sufficient to clear obstacles and slide duration allows passing under barriers.
TEST_2.expected: Jumps reach sufficient height with smooth arc animation. Slides lower the character appropriately. Both actions return to normal state after completion. Test succeeds after 15 seconds of successful jump/slide cycles.

TEST_3.test_description: Collision detection accuracy test. Verifies that the game correctly detects collisions with trains, obstacles, and barriers. Ensures hitboxes are properly sized and positioned.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game over state triggers immediately upon collision with any obstacle. No false positives (collisions when player clears obstacle). Test passes when collision is detected and game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
TEST_3.description: Collision detection accuracy test. Verifies that the game correctly detects collisions with trains, obstacles, and barriers. Ensures hitboxes are properly sized and positioned.
TEST_3.expected: Game over state triggers immediately upon collision with any obstacle. No false positives (collisions when player clears obstacle). Test passes when collision is detected and game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.

TEST_4.test_description: Coin collection and scoring system test. Validates that coins are collectible, properly increment the score, and disappear after collection. Tests the reward feedback loop.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each coin collected increases score by the correct amount. Coins disappear after collection. Score counter updates in real-time. Test succeeds after collecting 10+ coins with accurate score tracking.
TEST_4.description: Coin collection and scoring system test. Validates that coins are collectible, properly increment the score, and disappear after collection. Tests the reward feedback loop.
TEST_4.expected: Each coin collected increases score by the correct amount. Coins disappear after collection. Score counter updates in real-time. Test succeeds after collecting 10+ coins with accurate score tracking.

TEST_5.test_description: Speed progression and difficulty scaling test. Validates that game speed increases over time and obstacle frequency intensifies. Tests the core endless runner progression system.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game speed noticeably increases after 30 seconds. Obstacle spawn rate increases. Player can survive initial phase easily but finds challenge increasing. Test passes when clear progression is observed.
TEST_5.description: Speed progression and difficulty scaling test. Validates that game speed increases over time and obstacle frequency intensifies. Tests the core endless runner progression system.
TEST_5.expected: Game speed noticeably increases after 30 seconds. Obstacle spawn rate increases. Player can survive initial phase easily but finds challenge increasing. Test passes when clear progression is observed.

TEST_6.test_description: Obstacle avoidance validation test. Tests player's ability to successfully dodge obstacles using jump and slide mechanics. Ensures timing windows are fair and responsive.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Player successfully avoids obstacles using correct actions (jump for low, slide for high). Timing feels responsive and fair. Test succeeds after 45 seconds of survival with 20+ successful dodges.
TEST_6.description: Obstacle avoidance validation test. Tests player's ability to successfully dodge obstacles using jump and slide mechanics. Ensures timing windows are fair and responsive.

TEST_7.test_description: Long-term survival and endgame test. Validates game stability during extended play and tests if winning condition (if any) or high score achievement is possible. Ensures no memory leaks or performance degradation.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game remains stable and responsive throughout extended play. Frame rate stays consistent. High scores are achievable and tracked. Test succeeds after 60 seconds of stable gameplay or reaching a predefined win score threshold.
